case_title: WALLACE JOHNSON VS. ALLISON WHITTEMORE et al

docket_entries.description: PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2002, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JAMES M. ROGERS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-26-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-13-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KAREN FARNSWORTH. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-01-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. THE MAR-22-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, WALLACE AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTEMORE, ALLISON WHITTEMORE, RIDGWAY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-22-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-22-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-22-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-26-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-26-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
